task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Google Pixel 9 Pro (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $999.00 and wholesale is $629.00. Product features: Smartphone with Tensor G2 chip and advanced camera features. Reference: https://store.google.com/product/pixel_9_pro

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Google Pixel 9 Pro. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Google Pixel 9 Pro. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
